## Phase 1: Opening · 120s
<!-- phase_id: 1, planned_duration_seconds: 120 -->

### Point: Hook
<!-- point_id: 1_hook, tags: [critical, joke] -->
Open with a surprising story. Counts as covered when the audience laughs.

### Point: Credibility
<!-- point_id: 1_cred, tags: [critical] -->
One sentence on why you are the right person to talk about this.

## Phase 2: Problem · 180s
<!-- phase_id: 2, planned_duration_seconds: 180 -->

### Point: Problem Statement
<!-- point_id: 2_problem, tags: [critical] -->
Name the specific pain point clearly.

### Point: Evidence
<!-- point_id: 2_evidence -->
Back the problem with a concrete example or number.
